prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为约17507名、16014名、22574名、19096名、32426名。2023年位次明显后移（22574名），2024年有所回升（19096 名），2025年大幅后移至32426名，创5年新低，显示竞争格局发生显著变化；该校在山西省物理类招生计划：2021年14人、2022年13人、2023年14人、2024年11 人、2025年13人、2026年24人。2026年较2025年大幅扩招11人（+84.6%），扩招幅度极大，将显著稀释录取位次，使位次数字大幅增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京体育大 学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第177名。作为体育类211院校，在物理类考生中属于跨类报考，其体育特色专业（运动康复、康复物理治疗、运动人 体科学等）对物理类考生的吸引力相对有限；2026年声誉评价偏负面（排球决赛争议），但此类事件对物理类考生报考决策影响甚微；抖音热度排名第18（高热 ），学校整体关注度较高。声誉舆情对物理类报考无明显压制；体育学为北京体育大学核心优势学科，在物理类招生专业中，运动康复、康复物理治疗、运动人 体科学、数据科学与大数据技术等与体育科学、健康医学交叉，具有一定专业特色和就业前景。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业中，数据科学与大数据技术属计算机类热 门方向（社会热度推荐），运动康复、康复物理治疗等健康类专业热度升温（人口老龄化背景下需求增长），应用心理学热度平稳。山西省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较2025 年173347人减少约3.4%，考生规模小幅缩减，竞争略有缓解，但幅度远小于扩招带来的稀释效应；北京体育大学位于北京市，一线城市区位优势对山西省考生有 较强吸引力。但物理类招生专业多为体育特色专业，与综合性大学工科专业相比，对物理类考生的吸引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次32426名、2026年大幅 扩招84.6%（强烈倾向于位次大幅后移）、物理类考生小幅减少3.4%（倾向于位次前移但力度微弱）等因素，扩招的稀释效应远强于考生减少的缓解效应，预计2026年最低录取位 次较2025年显著后移。预测最低位次约46389名，区间45889–46889名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 17507, 16014, 22574, 19096, and 32426 respectively. In 2023, the ranking significantly dropped (22574), recovered somewhat in 2024 (19096), and sharply dropped to 32426 in 2025, a 5-year low, indicating a significant change in competition. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shanxi Province: 14 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 11 in 2024, 13 in 2025, and 24 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a substantial increase of 11 students (+84.6%), which will significantly dilute admission rankings, causing a large increase in ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 177th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. As a sports-focused 211 institution, it is a cross-category choice for Physics Category students. Its sports-specific majors (e.g., Sports Rehabilitation, Rehabilitation Physical Therapy, Sports Human Science) have relatively limited appeal to Physics Category students. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (volleyball final controversy), but such events have minimal impact on Physics Category students' application decisions. Douyin popularity ranks 18th (high heat), with overall high attention. Reputation and public opinion show no significant suppression for Physics Category applications. Sports Science is the core advantage discipline of Beijing Sport University. Among Physics Category enrollment majors, Sports Rehabilitation, Rehabilitation Physical Therapy, Sports Human Science, and Data Science and Big Data Technology intersect with sports science and health medicine, offering certain professional characteristics and employment prospects.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among Physics Category enrollment majors, Data Science and Big Data Technology is a popular direction in computer science (socially recommended). Health-related majors like Sports Rehabilitation and Rehabilitation Physical Therapy are gaining popularity (driven by aging population demand). Applied Psychology has stable popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition, but the effect is far smaller than the dilution from enrollment expansion. Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city with strong regional appeal to Shanxi examinees. However, Physics Category enrollment majors are mostly sports-specific, which have relatively limited appeal to Physics Category students compared to engineering majors at comprehensive universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 32426, the 2026 massive enrollment expansion of 84.6% (strongly favoring a significant ranking drop), and the slight 3.4% decrease in Physics Category examinees (favoring a ranking rise but with weak effect), the dilution effect of expansion far outweighs the easing effect of fewer examinees. It is predicted that the 2026 minimum admission ranking will significantly drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 46389, with a range of 45889–46889.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 45889–46889, due to the significant enrollment expansion in 2026, admission rankings will notably drop. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., below 45889), you can aim for popular majors like Data Science and Big Data Technology and Sports Rehabilitation. If your ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., above 46889), you should rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京体育大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第177名，较2025年的第180名略有上升，整体层次稳定。作为全国体育类院校的标杆，其211身份对考 生仍有较强吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及与南昌大学排球决赛相关的观众争议事件，但该类事件对报考决策的实际影响有限；抖音热度排名第18（ 高热），短视频平台曝光度高，有助于维持学校关注度。综合来看，声誉舆情对报考热度无明显压制；第五轮学科评估数据中未单独收录北京体育大学条目，但 作为全国顶尖体育类院校，体育学学科实力位居全国前列（北京师范大学体育学A、华东师范大学体育学A+），相关专业在体育领域具有显著优势。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3204名、2026年小幅扩招10%（倾向于位次后移）、山西省历史类考生大幅减少25.6%（倾向 于位次前移）、声誉舆情中性偏负面但影响有限等因素，考生规模缩减带来的竞争缓解效应略强于扩招的稀释效应，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移。预测最低位次约 3366名，区间2866–3866名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 2367, 2085, 4962, 2854, and 3204 respectively. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift in ranking (4962), with a recovery in 2024 (2854), and a slight backward shift again in 2025 to 3204. Rankings have fluctuated considerably over the past 5 years, with a baseline ranking of approximately 3204 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Shanxi Province: 12 students in 2021, 13 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 9 in 2024, 10 in 2025, and 11 in 2026. Compared to 2025, there is an increase of 1 student in 2026 (+10%), a relatively small expansion that has limited impact on the competitive landscape, but expansion itself tends to slightly increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 177th, a slight increase from 180th in 2025, indicating stable overall level. As a benchmark among national sports institutions, its 211 status still strongly attracts candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly related to audience controversy events during the volleyball finals with Nanchang University, but such events have limited actual impact on application decisions. Douyin popularity ranks 18th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, helping maintain attention to the university. Overall, reputation and public opinion show no significant suppression of application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation data, Beijing Sport University is not separately included, but as a top national sports institution, its sports science discipline strength ranks among the top in the country (Beijing Normal University sports science A, East China Normal University sports science A+), with related majors having significant advantages in the sports field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's History Category enrollment majors in Shanxi Province mainly include Journalism, Network and New Media, English, Chinese International Education, and Marxist Theory. Among them, journalism and communication majors show a clear trend of declining social popularity (the Zhang Xuefeng effect continues), which may reduce some candidates' willingness to apply. However, majors like Marxist Theory and Chinese International Education have relatively stable popularity. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Shanxi Province is approximately 63,113, a decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, significantly reducing the candidate pool and competition pressure, favoring a forward shift in ranking. Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, with strong regional appeal to Shanxi candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Shanxi Province is small (about 10 students), with a low enrollment proportion, so regional preference factors have limited impact on ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3204, a small expansion of 10% in 2026 (tending to shift ranking backward), a significant reduction of 25.6% in History Category candidates in Shanxi Province (tending to shift ranking forward), and a neutral-to-slightly-negative reputation with limited impact, the competition relief effect from the reduction in candidate numbers slightly outweighs the dilution effect from expansion. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3366, with a range of 2866–3866.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 2866), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Journalism and Network and New Media.
